name: Portal do Paciente — login e acesso ao dashboard

planSteps.description: Navigate to the login page at https://iamedcenter.netlify.app/
Enter 'testesprite@gmail.com' in the email input field
Enter 'testesprite123' in the password input field
Click the submit button to log in
Click on the 'Portal do Paciente e App Móvel' module card (id: 13)
The Patient Portal login form is displayed with 'ID DOCUMENT NUMBER' and password fields
Enter a valid document number in the 'ID DOCUMENT NUMBER' field
Enter a password in the password field
The OTP verification screen is displayed asking for a code
